headline: Stock Market Week: Sell Rules, Watchlists, Inflation Data And Iran
summary: With the market largely at the mercy of developments in the Iran war, it's a time for sell rules and watchlists.

headline: This Week's Market Wrap: Energy, Defense Stocks Take The Lead As Oil Prices Spike Higher
summary: Crude oil futures rose dramatically throughout the week, climbing from roughly $71 per barrel at the start of the week to above $90 by Friday. Read more here.
